modules.title: #61 Solid ash hardwood floor refinishing in a Del Mar bluff-top estate overlooking Torrey Pines State Beach near Carmel Valley Road. These new photos capture the transformation of a sun-faded ash floor in a coastal home just south of Del Mar Heights and Torrey Pines State Reserve. Using dust-containment sanding and careful repair work, the floors were restored to a natural clear finish that brightens the long hallways and living spaces. This project highlights ash hardwood’s unique grain while tying craftsmanship to one of San Diego’s most recognizable ocean-view neighborhoods.

images.alt: Del Mar hardwood floor refinishing project near Carmel Valley Road, solid ash flooring in a coastal estate overlooking Torrey Pines State Beach, sanded smooth with dust-containment equipment and refinished natural to highlight the ash grain.

modules.title: #62 Solid hickory hardwood floor refinishing in Rancho Santa Fe’s Fairbanks Ranch, on the edge of Solana Beach and just north of Del Mar near Via de la Valle. This elaborate estate featured vintage hickory floors that required a complete sand and refinish. We prepared the surface with dust-containment equipment, tested stain samples on site, and worked with the owners to select a custom finish that brought out the rich tones of the hickory. The project was completed with a Bona Traffic HD commercial-grade polyurethane, leaving the floors durable, elegant, and perfectly matched to the style of this Rancho Santa Fe estate.

images.alt: Rancho Santa Fe Fairbanks Ranch hardwood floor refinishing near Solana Beach and Del Mar, solid vintage hickory floors fully sanded, stain samples tested for color selection, and completed with dust-free sanding plus Bona Traffic HD finish for a satin sheen in a luxury estate.

modules.title: #63 Maple hardwood floor refinishing in Carmel Valley, San Diego. This Lauzon maple floor was fully sanded with dust-containment equipment to keep the home clean and safe. After preparation, Bona AmberSeal was applied to add a warm tone to the naturally pale maple, followed by a commercial-grade finish that brought the surface to perfection. This mid-county San Diego project shows how even well-worn maple floors can be restored to a rich, elegant look with the right process and products.

modules.title: #65 La Jolla Shores oak floor refinishing with major termite damage repair. In this mid-century home near Scripps Pier at the bottom of Torrey Pines Road, an entire section of vintage oak flooring was replaced and blended with new boards. After repairs, the floor was sanded dust-free, stained nutmeg, and finished with a satin sheen for a seamless historical restoration.

modules.title: #67 Douglas fir hardwood floor refinishing in San Diego’s Golden Hill historic district, near South Park, North Park, Bankers Hill, and the Gaslamp Quarter. This vintage softwood flooring, common in older San Diego apartments and historic homes, was worn and dull from decades of use. We fully restored the Douglas fir with dust-free sanding and a satin finish, bringing back the natural warmth and character of this rare softwood. Another Golden Hill apartment project showing expert hardwood restoration in San Diego’s historic neighborhoods.

modules.title: #68 Solid red oak floor refinishing in Rancho Santa Fe Farms near Carmel Valley and Del Mar, just off the 56 freeway in North County San Diego. This 1980s red oak had turned orange from old oil-based polyurethane. The first photo shows the Bona dust-containment vacuum set up before sanding, while the second reveals the transformation—refinished with rotary equipment to a creamy, modern, beach-inspired tone with a light white haze. The result is a bright, contemporary look that perfectly suits this Rancho Santa Fe estate.

images.alt: Rancho Santa Fe Farms hardwood floor refinishing project near Carmel Valley and Del Mar, solid red oak from 1980s sanded with Bona dust containment system, transformed from orange oil-based polyurethane to a creamy modern white haze finish in a luxury estate off the 56 freeway.

modules.title: #69 Solid white oak floor restoration in a Del Mar ocean-view rental home. This 1980 installation had turned extremely orange from old polyurethane, with severe sun damage, water damage, and termite damage. Our team replaced damaged boards, sanded the floor clean, and provided custom stain samples. The homeowner chose a light water-based sealer from Bona to keep the oak natural and bright, finished with a commercial-grade satin sheen. The before photos show heavy damage, while the after reveals a flawless, flat, brand-new look—perfect for a coastal property overlooking the Pacific in Del Mar.

images.alt: Del Mar hardwood floor restoration, solid white oak floors in ocean-view rental repaired for sun, water, and termite damage; sanded and refinished with Bona water-based sealer and satin commercial finish for bright natural look.

modules.title: #70 Carbonized bamboo floor refinishing in University City, San Diego. This 30-year-old, horizontally laminated bamboo floor had severe sun fading and surface wear but remained structurally sound. Located just south of UTC, near Mount Soledad, La Jolla, and Pacific Beach, the home sits in a classic residential neighborhood off the 52 Freeway. We sanded away the tough aluminum oxide finish with full dust-containment equipment, then restored the bamboo with a traditional oil sealer to deepen its natural carbonized color. A commercial-grade finish completed the project, leaving the floors rich, durable, and stunning—proof that even decades-old bamboo can be brought back to life.

images.alt: University City San Diego bamboo floor refinishing project off 52 Freeway, horizontally laminated carbonized bamboo sanded dust-free to remove aluminum oxide finish, restored with oil sealer and commercial-grade coating for rich natural color.

images.caption: University City bamboo floor refinishing near UTC and La Jolla—dust-free sanding and oil sealer restore carbonized tone.

Located in South Mission Beach off Mission Boulevard near the jetty and Pacific Beach, the floor was fully restored with dust-free sanding and finished natural with a durable commercial-grade coating. The result is a flawless, beach-ready floor designed to withstand renters and heavy boardwalk traffic—an excellent example of expert coastal hardwood floor refinishing in San Diego’s Crown Point, Mission Bay, Bay Park, Bay Ho, and Point Loma neighborhoods.

modules.title: #73 Brazilian cherry floor restoration – Coronado Island, First Avenue This Coronado Island home on First Avenue overlooks downtown San Diego with spectacular bay and city views. The first photo shows the engineered Brazilian cherry floor sanded back to raw wood, with protective plastic hung to safeguard art and furniture during the dust-free process. The second photo, taken at night, captures the final coat of polyurethane still wet, glowing under accent lighting like a mirror and restoring the deep cherry tone to its original brilliance. A showcase of our specialty in high-humidity coastal floor refinishing with complete dust containment on Coronado Island.

modules.title: #74 Wide plank French oak refinishing – Olivenhain, Encinitas This Olivenhain home near Encinitas Ranch and horse country had character-grade, wide plank, long length French oak with a 6 mm top layer that was sun-faded and worn, likely from its original oiled finish. We sanded the floor completely flat, removed the wire brushing, and contained all dust throughout the project. A custom stain mix brought the planks to a creamy, beachy, light beige tone, perfectly suited to the coastal setting. Finished with extra-thick Bona Traffic HD in matte sheen, the result is a silky smooth, durable modern masterpiece of wide plank French oak for this Encinitas residence.

images.alt: Encinitas Olivenhain French oak wide plank hardwood floor refinishing with dust-free sanding, wire brushing removed, creamy beach-style beige custom stain applied, and extra-thick Bona Traffic HD matte polyurethane finish for a smooth durable surface in a San Diego County coastal ranch home.

modules.title: #75 French oak floor refinishing – Olivenhain Encinitas coastal ranch area This wide plank, long length French oak floor in an Olivenhain home near Rancho Santa Fe Road, El Camino Real, and Lucadia received a full transformation. The original oiled surface was faded and worn from years of southern exposure. We sanded away the texture and restored the floor to absolute flatness, using our Bona Portable Dust Containment Unit to ensure 100% dust-free sanding. A custom beige-toned stain gave the oak a modern, beachy look, and multiple coats of Bona Traffic HD matte finish created a smooth, durable surface built for coastal living near Encinitas Boulevard and the Pacific.

modules.title: #76 Richard Marshall walnut floor restoration – Bing Crosby Ranch, San Diego At the Bing Crosby Ranch, this Richard Marshall walnut floor underwent a complete transformation. The first image shows the heavy, dark brown tung oil stain being sanded away with our 100% dust containment system. The second reveals the same wide plank walnut sanded flat to perfection, ready for finishing. Upgraded from the old oily finish to a refined custom “special walnut” color, this floor now highlights the natural grain with a smooth, durable look. Videos of this sanding process are featured on our site and YouTube channel, showing the care and precision behind the work.

modules.title: #78 Vintage Beech Wood Restoration – South Park, San Diego. This hundred-year-old beech hardwood floor in South Park had been worn down by decades of use and covered in a dark brown stain and polyurethane. In the left photo you see the boards being sanded back to raw beech; in the right, the completed restoration with traditional finishes that revived the natural beauty and light tone of the wood. Damaged boards were replaced with custom-milled, era-specific beech planks to match the original species, grade, and dimensions. This type of historical wood floor restoration is our specialty throughout San Diego neighborhoods including Golden Hill, North Park, South Park, La Mesa, Lemon Grove, Mission Valley, and the college area near SDSU.

images.alt: Before-and-after vintage beech wood floor restoration in South Park, San Diego near Golden Hill and North Park, showing sanding to raw beech and refinishing with traditional products plus custom replacement boards.

modules.title: #79 White Oak Hardwood Floor Installation – Pacific Beach ADU near Mission Bay & La Jolla This Pacific Beach granny flat addition features real unfinished white oak hardwood floors, four inches wide, rift and quartered, select grade, and nailed down the traditional way. These are square-edge, random-length boards installed by San Diego Hardwoods for in-place sanding and finishing. Many homeowners in Pacific Beach, Mission Bay, Crown Point, and nearby La Jolla look for “hardwood floor installation near me” or “install wood floors in Pacific Beach,” and this project shows exactly that kind of craftsmanship. Hand-selected rift and quartered white oak provides a straighter grain, more stability, and top-quality appearance, perfect for coastal San Diego homes. Installed on the south side of Mount Soledad, this floor will be finished in place for a smooth, seamless look that will last generations.
